title: Enjoy a movie under the stars this Valentine's Day
description: GEORGE NEWS - Couples and movie lovers are invited to enjoy a romantic Movie Under the Stars evening at the Fairy Knowe Hotel on Saturday 14 February. The outdoor screening will feature the much-loved
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - Couples and movie lovers are invited to enjoy a romantic Movie Under the Stars evening at the Fairy Knowe Hotel on Saturday 14 February.

The outdoor screening will feature the much-loved romantic comedy Notting Hill starring Julia Roberts and Hugh Grant.

Guests are asked to bring their own camping chairs and picnic baskets to enjoy the evening under the night sky.

The event starts at 19:30 for a 20:00 screening. While the hotel restaurant will be closed, a cash bar will be available.

All proceeds raised will go towards the Seven Passes Initiative. Tickets are available on Quicket at R150 each.
